title: Pressurized water storage tank with uv lamp having disinfecting function
abstract: The present invention relates to the field of water purification, and discloses a pressurizable water storage tank suitable for disinfecting water, comprising a tank body (1) and a disinfecting means (2) which is installed on the tank body (1) and is capable of disinfecting water in the tank body (1); wherein the disinfection means (2) comprises a disinfection lamp. The present water storage tank employs a gas bag-free design, and has a disinfecting function; it has advantages such as low cost, convenient use, low contamination and is highly pragmatic to use.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A pressurizable water storage tank suitable for disinfecting water, comprising a tank body (1 ) and a disinfecting means (2) which is installed on the tank body (1 ) and is capable of disinfecting water in the tank body (1 ); wherein the disinfection means (2) comprises a disinfection lamp. 2. A pressurizable water storage tank according to claim 1 , wherein, the pressurizable water storage tank consists of a tank body (1 ) and a disinfecting means (2) which is installed on the tank body (1 ) and is capable of disinfecting water in the tank body (1 ); wherein a water inlet/outlet (3) is provided at the bottom of the tank body (1 ), and wherein the disinfection means (2) comprises a disinfection lamp. 3. A pressurizable water storage tank according to Claim 1 or 2, wherein, the disinfecting means (2) comprises a main body (21 ) with an inner cavity; inside the inner cavity of the main body (21 ) suitable for receiving a battery (22) and a conductive means (23), a control module (24) connected electrically to the battery (22), and an ultraviolet disinfection lamp (25) connected to the control module (24) via the conductive means (23); wherein, the control module (24) controls the operation of the ultraviolet disinfecting lamp (25) as a function of pressure inside the water storage tank. 4. A pressurizable water storage tank according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the conductive means comprises a conductive plate. 5. A pressurizable water storage tank according to any of the preceding claims, wherein, the top of the tank body (1 ) is provided with a stepped hole for installing the disinfecting means (2), the stepped hole being divided into a first stepped hole (1 1 ) and a second stepped hole (12) which are connected to each other, and the diameter of the first stepped hole (1 1 ) being greater than the diameter of the second stepped hole (12); an inner thread is provided on a hole wall of the first stepped hole (1 1 ); a middle part of the main body (21 ) is provided with an 

 outer thread which fits the inner thread on the first stepped hole (1 1 ), a lower part of the main body (21 ) is inserted into the second stepped hole (12). 6. A pressurizable water storage tank according to any of the preceding claims, wherein and the ultraviolet disinfection lamp (25) is fixed to the lower part of the main body (21 ). 7. A pressurizable water storage tank according to any of the preceding claims, wherein, a sealing ring (26) is provided between the lower part of the main body (21 ) and the second stepped hole (12). 8. A Pressurizable water storage tank according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the tank body (1 ) is rectangular cuboid in shape. 9. A Pressurizable water storage tank according to any of the preceding claims, wherein the tank body (1 ) is devoid of a gas bag. 10. Use of a disinfection means comprising a disinfection lamp in a pressurizable water tank for disinfecting water in a tank body, wherein the pressurized water tank is devoid of a gas bag.
